## ITenantValidator Interface

Validates that a command's tenant matches the actor's tenant identity\.
SEC\-2: Defense\-in\-depth tenant isolation at actor level\.

```csharp
public interface ITenantValidator
```

## ITenantValidator\.Validate\(string, string\) Method

Validates that the command tenant matches the actor's tenant \(extracted from actor ID\)\.

```csharp
void Validate(string commandTenantId, string actorId);
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.ITenantValidator.Validate(string,string).commandTenantId'></a>

`commandTenantId` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The tenant ID from the command envelope\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.ITenantValidator.Validate(string,string).actorId'></a>

`actorId` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The actor ID in format \{tenant\}:\{domain\}:\{aggregateId\}\.

#### Exceptions

[TenantMismatchException](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Actors.TenantMismatchException.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Actors\.TenantMismatchException')  
Thrown when tenants do not match\.

[System\.InvalidOperationException](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.invalidoperationexception 'System\.InvalidOperationException')  
Thrown when actor ID format is malformed\.
